subject: Cardiologist | Flexible Hours & $50/hr
body:

This is a straightforward way to apply deep clinical expertise outside of a traditional practice setting, at a rate that reflects your professional level. If this sounds like a worthwhile use of your time, I'd encourage you to take a look at what's currently available.

subject: Cardiologists earn $50/hr shaping AI medical models
